name: KoboldAI Lite
description: A web-based frontend for LLM APIs, including AI Horde. Offers multiple UI themes (Classic, Aesthetic, Corpo), instruct mode, quick-start scenarios, save/load support, and simultaneous access to many AI Horde models.

name: SillyTavern
description: A powerful locally-installed LLM frontend supporting AI Horde, KoboldAI/CPP, NovelAI, OpenAI, Claude, and many more APIs. Features include Visual Novel Mode, image generation via Automatic1111/ComfyUI, TTS, WorldInfo (lorebooks), mobile-friendly layout, auto-translate, and a rich extension ecosystem. Over 300 contributors and 3+ years of active development.

name: Inneal
description: A native iOS and iPadOS LLM roleplay chatbot client for the AI Horde. Import Tavern character cards, enjoy multi-character chat, personas, message swiping, and an 'Auto Mode' for easy setup. Syncs chats and characters across devices via CloudKit.

name: AgnAIstic
description: Open source AI character chat platform, publicly hosted at agnai.chat or self-hostable. Supports AI Horde and many other AI services, with features including image generation, long-term memory/embeddings, character expressions, memory books, stop generation, and chat graphs.

name: TavernAI
description: An adventure atmospheric chat client supporting multiple AI backends including KoboldAI, NovelAI, Pygmalion, and OpenAI ChatGPT. Can be downloaded locally or tried online via Google Colab. The predecessor project that inspired SillyTavern.
